Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); console.log\(z.ZodError.prototype.constructor.name\); const r = z.object\({name: z.string\(\)}\).safeParse\({}\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.error\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const {z} = require\('zod'\); const r = z.object\({n: z.string\(\)}\).safeParse\({}\); console.log\(Object.keys\(r.error\)\); console.log\(r.error.issues[0].message\)")
